proposed_description: mentre lays two ongoing actions side by side over the same stretch (both verbs typically imperfetto); (non) appena marks a trigger instant (as soon as). Traps: durante + clause (durante takes only a noun), and appena/mentre swapped across the overlap-vs-instant line.

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: Mentre cucinavo, lui guardava la TV. / Appena arrivo, ti chiamo.
proposed_attributes.common_miss: durante + clause (durante cucinavo); appena for an ongoing overlap.

rationale: The connective.time aggregate's description names mentre and (non) appena but no leaf holds them; finché is negation's and prima/dopo has its own leaf. Needed while authoring conn_time_05 and conn_time_06, which are delivered against this proposed id (runtime warns at authoring, strict-rejects at production load, so ratification gates their manifest entry).
